title: VxRail Secure Remote Services (SRS) / Call Home Connectivity Health
app: VxRail connectivity checks exported to Splunk
spl:
index=vxrail sourcetype="vxrail:support_gateway" earliest=-24h
| eval ok=lower(dell_services_reachable)
| eval gs=lower(gateway_state)
| where ok="false" OR match(gs, "(?i)down|error") OR match(lower(coalesce(proxy_error, _raw)), "(?i)proxy|tls|timeout")
| stats latest(last_successful_upload) as last_up, values(proxy_error) as errs
description: Broken call-home paths delay proactive case creation and parts dispatch. Operators may not notice until a fault occurs.
value: Restores predictive support value and shortens hardware RMA cycles.
implementation: Test endpoints from automation weekly. Alert on failed reachability. Document firewall allow lists in the runbook link.
visualization: Single value connectivity; timeline tests; error codes table.
grandmaExplanation: We keep an eye on vxRail Secure Remote Services (SRS) / Call Home Connectivity Health and raise the alarm before it drags down real work or real outages start.
knownFalsePositives: IGEL and endpoint UMS health can warn during bulk firmware, certificate rotation, or when a single site loses WAN; use device cohorts to separate local noise from UMS issues.
